name: Baba Ghannuj (Eggplant Appetizer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 375°F.
2. Wash the eggplant and remove the stem.
3. Pierce the eggplant with a fork 4-6 times.
4. Place in a baking dish.
5. Bake for 45 minutes or until tender. Remove from the oven.
6. Run under cold water and peel.
7. Mash; set aside.
8. In a serving bowl, combine garlic, salt, and Tahini.
9. Gradually add water and lemon juice, beating well.
10. Fold in the mashed eggplant.
11. Garnish with lemon wedges, finely chopped parsley, and a sprinkle of olive oil.
12. Serve scooped up on pieces of Pita Bread or as a side dish with any meal.
